title: quwt #6962
definition:
1) to loathe, be grieved, feel a loathing
    1a) (Qal) to feel a loathing
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to feel loathing against self
        1b2) to detest
    1c) (Hithpolel) to loathe oneself
nasbUsage:
